title: Business Solutions | K.S. Leow Group
description: We offer every essential business service business needs - auditing, secretarial, taxation, IT hardware, and accounting & POS system support & training.

facts.serviceArea: Malaysia, with local support in Pahang including Mentakab and Temerloh.
products: AutoCount Accounting: Malaysia's leading desktop accounting software. Full SST and e‑Invoice ready.
FeedMe POS: Cloud F&B POS with table management, kitchen display, and online ordering integration.
AutoCount CloudAccounting: Browser‑based accounting with e‑Invoice, AI SmartScan, bank connection, and anytime access.
AutoCount POS: AutoCount POS Malaysia for retail, F&B, branch outlets, barcode scanning, receipt printing, stock control, and AutoCount Accounting integration.
ServerLink: Secure, fast, and reliable remote access solution for your business software.
AutoCount Cloud Payroll: Automated payroll compliant with EPF, SOCSO, PCB, and EIS. Payslips in minutes.
AutoCount OneSale: Omnichannel sales management seamlessly integrated with AutoCount.
services: Taxation & Accounting: Bookkeeping, financial statements, tax filing, SST & e‑Invoice compliance, and LHDN liaison.
Secretarial & Management: Company incorporation, SSM annual filings, board resolutions, and corporate compliance.
Auditing: Independent financial audits for stakeholders, banks, and regulatory bodies.
Computer Hardware & Technical: Hardware wholesale, IT infrastructure, networking, and on‑site SME support across Pahang.
Software Training & Support: Authorized AutoCount & FeedMe dealer — installation, licensing, training, and support.
Webinar & Workshops: Live webinars and on‑demand training on accounting, tax, and business software.
otherServices: AutoCount Plugin: Custom AutoCount plugin development and workflow extensions designed to automate repetitive document flows, reduce manual entry, and adapt AutoCount Accounting to real business operations.
Printing / Advertising / Design: Our partner for business‑ready printing, advertising material, and visual design support for signboards, campaigns, corporate stationery, and promotional collateral.
Sitegiant Integration: Omnichannel e‑commerce synchronization with AutoCount Accounting, streamlining inventory, sales, and fulfillment across multiple marketplaces.

sections.heading: Our Service Offerings
body: Every essential service your business needs — all under one roof since 1981.

sections.heading: Software We Specialize In
body: We are certified partners for Malaysia's leading accounting and business software solutions.

sections.heading: Other Services
body: Explore additional services that support your business operations, customer reach, and AutoCount workflows.
